research_output.summary: Resupply is a sustainable goods marketplace connecting environmentally conscious consumers with ethically sourced products. Founded in 2019, the company operates a B2C platform enabling households to transition to sustainable alternatives across cleaning, personal care, and pantry categories. Resupply partners with over 200 certified sustainable brands and has served more than 150,000 customers across North America.
research_output.executive_summary: Resupply is a sustainability-first e-commerce platform with 150K+ customers, 200+ brand partners, and a 4.7/5 average product rating. Revenue grew 68% YoY in 2023.

press_coverage.title: Resupply Raises $12M Series A to Expand Sustainable Goods Platform
press_coverage.snippet: The round was led by Kleiner Perkins with participation from existing investors.

press_coverage.title: How Resupply Is Making Eco-Friendly Shopping Mainstream
press_coverage.snippet: CEO Jane Park explains the company's approach to reducing friction in sustainable purchasing.

press_coverage.title: Resupply Partners With 50 New Brands in Q3 2023
press_coverage.snippet: Expansion into food and beverage category drives platform growth.

research_output.site_content: Resupply - Shop sustainable goods for your home. Free shipping on orders over $50. 30-day returns. Certified B-Corp brands only.

aeo_details.quote: Resupply is a growing sustainable goods marketplace popular among eco-conscious households.
Resupply offers curated sustainable products with certified brand partnerships.

brand_dna.mission: Make sustainable living effortless and accessible for every household.
brand_dna.tone: Warm, optimistic, and educational — empowers action without guilt-tripping
brand_dna.visual_style: Clean earth tones, minimal packaging aesthetics, natural textures

profile_output.positioning_statement: For eco-conscious households who want to reduce their environmental impact without sacrificing convenience or quality, Resupply is the sustainable goods marketplace that makes the switch effortless — with curated, certified products and a seamless shopping experience.
usps: 200+ certified sustainable brands, all B-Corp or equivalent
Expert curation — every product passes a 15-point sustainability audit

marketing_gaps.gap: Low AEO score (6.5/10) — Resupply is underrepresented in AI assistant recommendations
marketing_gaps.recommendation: Publish authoritative long-form content targeting 'best sustainable cleaning products' and similar high-intent queries to build AI-visible authority.

marketing_gaps.gap: Limited B2B/corporate sustainability angle despite growing demand
marketing_gaps.recommendation: Launch a dedicated corporate gifting and office supplies vertical targeting sustainability-focused HR teams.

marketing_gaps.gap: Social proof underutilized — 150K customers but minimal UGC campaigns
marketing_gaps.recommendation: Launch a #ResupplyChallenge UGC campaign incentivizing customers to share swap stories.

segments.name: The Eco-Pragmatist

goals: Reduce household carbon footprint by 30% this year
frustrations: Products that don't perform as well as conventional alternatives

pain_points: Can't tell which 'eco' brands are genuinely sustainable vs. greenwashing
Premium pricing feels punishing for doing the right thing
Difficult to find all sustainable products in one place
buying_triggers: Side-by-side performance comparisons with conventional alternatives
segments.reasoning: Resupply's B-Corp certification focus and transparency-first messaging directly addresses this segment's core anxiety about greenwashing. High purchase frequency potential.

segments.name: The New Parent Switcher

goals: Eliminate toxins from the home environment
Build sustainable habits for kids to inherit
frustrations: Products marketed as 'natural' that contain harmful chemicals

pain_points: Overwhelming amount of information about harmful household chemicals
Don't trust conventional brands anymore after having children
Budget constraints with new family expenses
segments.reasoning: Life-stage transition (new parenthood) is a proven category entry point. Resupply's safety certifications and ingredient transparency directly address this segment's anxiety drivers.

segments.name: The Corporate Sustainability Champion

goals: Create a sustainable office environment as a talent retention tool
frustrations: Procurement process makes sustainable sourcing difficult
Can't find one vendor for all sustainable office needs

pain_points: No centralized sustainable procurement solution for office supplies
Difficulty demonstrating ROI on sustainability initiatives to leadership
Employee sustainability preferences are fragmented and hard to address at scale
buying_triggers: Volume pricing and B2B account management
ESG reporting data and carbon offset documentation
segments.reasoning: Identified from Resupply's marketing gap analysis — B2B corporate channel is underdeveloped. High LTV potential with enterprise accounts.

social_posts.post_copy: Switched to Resupply 6 months ago. My cleaning cabinet went from 12 products to 4 — all certified sustainable, all actually work. The laundry detergent alone removes grass stains better than Tide. Proof that eco doesn't mean compromise.
social_posts.cta: Link in bio to see our best-sellers — all rated 4.8+ by real customers.

social_posts.post_copy: When our daughter was born, we went through every product under our sink. Found parabens, synthetic fragrance, formaldehyde releasers. Resupply's ingredient filter made switching easy — everything passes a 15-point safety audit. Your home, audited.
social_posts.cta: See our Baby-Safe collection — all products vetted by pediatric health advisors.

social_posts.post_copy: We helped a 2,000-person tech company replace 100% of their office cleaning supplies with certified sustainable alternatives — and cut procurement costs by 18% through consolidated ordering. Their Scope 3 report now includes every SKU. This is what sustainable procurement looks like at scale.
social_posts.cta: Book a 20-minute demo with our enterprise team to see the platform.

email_campaigns.subject: The greenwashing test: 3 questions to ask every 'eco' brand
email_campaigns.preview_text: We asked them so you don't have to.
email_campaigns.body:
Hi [First Name],

You've probably seen the term 'eco-friendly' slapped on everything from plastic bottles to fast fashion.

At Resupply, we put every brand through a 15-point sustainability audit before they make it onto our platform. The three questions that eliminate 80% of applicants:

1. Can you provide third-party certification for your claims?
2. What's your end-of-life packaging plan?
3. Do you disclose full ingredient lists, including fragrances?

Most brands fail question 3 alone.

Every product on Resupply passes all 15. No exceptions.

[View Our Certified Collection]

email_campaigns.subject: The 6 household products pediatricians say to replace first
email_campaigns.preview_text: Your home probably has at least 3 of these.
email_campaigns.body:
Hi [First Name],

When it comes to your baby's health, the products you use every day matter as much as the ones you buy specifically for them.

We partnered with pediatric health advisors to identify the 6 most common household products with ingredients of concern:

1. Fabric softeners (synthetic musks)
2. Air fresheners (phthalates)
3. All-purpose cleaners (quaternary ammonium compounds)
4. Dish soap (fragrance blends)
5. Laundry detergent (optical brighteners)
6. Dryer sheets (benzyl acetate)

We have certified-safe alternatives for all of them — same performance, complete transparency.

[Build Your Safe Home Bundle]

emails.subject: The data behind Resupply's 15-point audit
emails.body:
Hi [First Name],

Most sustainable brands self-certify. We don't.

Every product on Resupply passes a 15-point audit covering ingredient safety, supply chain transparency, packaging end-of-life, and third-party certifications.

We reject 78% of brand applicants. That's the filter you deserve.

Worth exploring what that looks like for your household?

emails.subject: Your top 3 cleaning products, audited
emails.body:
Hi [First Name],

I ran your most common cleaning products through our audit criteria — here's what we found:

- Multi-surface spray: Contains quaternary ammonium compounds (respiratory concern with long-term exposure)
- Fabric softener: Synthetic musks detected — no biodegradability data
- Dish soap: Fragrance blend listed (no ingredient disclosure)

We have certified alternatives for all three — same efficacy, full transparency.

Want me to put together a swap bundle?

emails.subject: 15-minute call to build your sustainable home kit?
emails.body:
Hi [First Name],

I've helped 12 households in [City] complete a full home audit and switch to certified alternatives in under 3 weeks.

If you'd like a personalized product list and a first-order discount, I can put that together on a quick call.

Would [Day] at [Time] work?

emails.subject: How [Company] could hit Scope 3 targets with one procurement switch
emails.body:
Hi [First Name],

I noticed [Company] published a sustainability commitment last quarter. Office supplies and cleaning products are typically 3-8% of a company's Scope 3 emissions — and they're the easiest to address.

Resupply's enterprise platform handles procurement, carbon offset documentation, and ESG reporting data automatically.

Would it be useful to see how a comparable company did it?

emails.subject: Case study: How Meridian Capital cut sustainable procurement costs by 18%
emails.body:
Hi [First Name],

Meridian Capital (2,000 employees, SF HQ) switched their entire office cleaning and supplies program to Resupply 8 months ago.

Results: 18% procurement cost reduction through consolidated ordering, full Scope 3 documentation included in their annual ESG report, and a 23-point increase in employee satisfaction scores related to workplace environment.

I can share the full case study and a platform demo. Would that be valuable?

emails.subject: 30-day pilot for [Company]?
emails.body:
Hi [First Name],

For enterprise accounts, we offer a 30-day no-commitment pilot — full platform access, dedicated account manager, and a cost comparison report at the end.

No procurement process required to start. Just a signed NDA and a list of your current suppliers.

Is this something you could greenlight for Q1?

linkedin_templates.connection_request: Hi [Name] — I work with sustainability-focused consumers to find products that actually back up their eco claims. Your recent post about [topic] resonated. Would love to connect.
linkedin_templates.follow_up_1: Thanks for connecting, [Name]. Given your interest in [sustainable topic], I thought you might find our greenwashing detection framework useful — it's the same criteria we use to vet 200+ brands on our platform. Happy to share if it'd be helpful.
linkedin_templates.follow_up_2: One more thing — we just published a side-by-side performance comparison of our top cleaning products vs. conventional alternatives. 15 metrics, third-party tested. Thought you'd find the data interesting: [link]. No pitch, just useful data.

linkedin_templates.connection_request: Hi [Name] — saw your work on [Company]'s sustainability initiative. We help enterprise teams operationalize sustainable procurement at scale. Would be great to connect.
linkedin_templates.follow_up_1: Thanks [Name] — I noticed [Company] has a sustainability commitment that includes supply chain. One of our clients in a similar space was able to document and reduce their office-related Scope 3 emissions by switching vendors. Happy to share how they structured it.
linkedin_templates.follow_up_2: Sharing a 2-page case study on how Meridian Capital (2,000 employees) reduced procurement costs 18% while hitting ESG targets — the CFO was skeptical but it paid back in 4 months. Might be relevant for your Q1 planning: [link].

signals: Added to cart but didn't purchase
Clicked pricing or bulk order link
lead_scoring.action: Immediate personal outreach within 24 hours. Offer free sample bundle or consultation call.
Enroll in 3-email nurture sequence. Prioritize educational content over product promotion.
Re-engagement campaign with high-value free content. Remove from sequence after 90 days of no activity.

ab_variations.headline: Eco Products That Outperform Conventional | Resupply
ab_variations.body: Side-by-side tested. Our laundry detergent beats Tide on grass stains. Our dish soap cuts grease in cold water. Certified sustainable, uncompromised performance.
ab_variations.test_hypothesis: Performance-first messaging will outperform certification-first messaging for pragmatic eco shoppers who've been burned by underperforming eco products.
ab_variations.image_prompt: Split screen comparison of clean vs dirty fabric, scientific lab aesthetic, clean white background

ab_variations.headline: The Only Sustainable Marketplace With a 15-Point Audit
ab_variations.body: 78% of brands that apply to Resupply are rejected. Every product earns its place. 200+ certified brands, 150,000+ satisfied customers.
ab_variations.test_hypothesis: Exclusivity and rigorous curation messaging builds trust faster than performance claims for research-driven eco shoppers.
ab_variations.image_prompt: Magnifying glass over ingredient label with green checkmarks, clinical clean background, trust and verification visual

ab_variations.headline: Your Home Is Safe. Here's the Proof.
ab_variations.body: Every product passes a 15-point safety audit. Full ingredient disclosure. No synthetic fragrance. No quaternary ammonium compounds. Peace of mind, certified.
ab_variations.test_hypothesis: Specific ingredient callouts and safety certification language will convert anxious new parents better than general 'natural' claims.
ab_variations.image_prompt: Clean ingredient list with green checkmarks, white background, reassuring medical-style visual
